html: WOW. That was alot of models. I will be sure to look into those. What caught my eye was the North Mini Code. How is that at reason and context? I guess I will just go see. Thank you for the insight. I am building and learning at the same time, and I really need a model that wont chew up my poor little M1, but at the same time will understand my direction, my context, and also my explanation of need and then be ...' oh, I know what you mean..' then help vibe with me to create it. Qwen was a code model but hallucinated and was never really good at contextual understanding. Gemma seems to get it but isnt necessarily a coding model.(As you said) And I just cant be bogged down with all these fees to get what I need on my journey. So onward on the model search I suppose. Thank you very much for the time.
